_comment: Abandoned Teleportation Array (废弃传送阵) — a rare biome where ancient teleport arrays generate in the Starry Sky dimension. Canon: the Alliance Star System is dotted with abandoned ancient teleportation arrays from before the Cultivation Alliance's era — some still functional, most broken. Cultivators traveling through the starry sky sometimes discover these and either repair them (canon teleport) or scavenge their spirit stones. Sky has a faint purple hue (the residual energy of broken arrays). Features: structure ergenverse:abandoned_teleportation_array (uses jigsaw with a vanilla end_city piece as stand-in). Mobs: empty (handled by simulation).
